results.title: Camille hits out at Govt 'spite'
results.description: MEMBER of Parliament for Trincity/Maloney Camille Robinson-Regis has rejected the Government's allegations of mismanagement and corruption, claiming the deterioration of her constituency is the result of political spite by the current administration.

results.title: FM Sybiha responds to Russian strike near Romania on gas tanker bound for Ukraine
results.description: Andrii Sybiha, head of Ukraine’s Ministry of Foreign Affairs, called for tougher sanctions and increased pressure on Russia following its attack on a tanker off the coast of Romania.

results.title: Who Is Matthew Aaron VanDyke? Why A Delhi Court Allowed Him Special Diet In Tihar Jail
results.description: A Delhi court has allowed NIA accused Matthew Aaron VanDyke to receive a special vegetarian diet, cooking facilities and medical support inside Tihar Jail, citing humanitarian and health grounds.

results.title: Police boss to meet youth leaders and educators about social media ban
results.description: Cheshire's police commissioner has said ‘honest conversations’ need to be had about how to deal with children who work around the forthcoming social media ban.

results.title: 25 sentences that changed how people think
results.description: From Socrates to Sun Tzu, these 25 sentences that changed the world reshaped how people reason about the self, power, ethics, language, and reality
